tryLoadDAG.signature: tryLoadDAG(cwd: string): { dag: object|null, path: string }
tryLoadDAG.description: Centralized DAG.json loader with canonical path (.planning/sets/DAG.json). Returns null dag on ENOENT instead of throwing. All DAG consumers must use this instead of direct fs.readFileSync.

recalculateDAGAtInit.description: Called during init flow after roadmap acceptance and STATE.json write to create initial DAG.json.

reliableStateTransition.signature: transitionSet(cwd: string, setId: string, targetStatus: string): void
reliableStateTransition.description: Execute-set Step 6 restructured to run state transition BEFORE git commit operations, with explicit CWD and retry on lock contention.

canonical-dag-path.description: All DAG.json reads and writes MUST use canonical path .planning/sets/DAG.json. The path .planning/DAG.json in merge.cjs must be fixed.

graceful-enoent.description: Missing DAG.json must never crash the application. tryLoadDAG returns null, consumers fall back to auto-regeneration or informational messages.

state-before-commit.description: In execute-set Step 6, state transition to complete must occur BEFORE git commit operations to prevent the stuck-in-executing bug.

definition.scope: Fix the DAG.json lifecycle gaps that cause downstream failures: path consolidation, centralized tryLoadDAG(), ENOENT defensive handling, execute-set state-to-complete transition reliability, and DAG.json creation at init time.

tasks.description: Create centralized tryLoadDAG(cwd) function in dag.cjs that uses canonical path .planning/sets/DAG.json and returns null on ENOENT
tasks.acceptance: Function exists, tests cover ENOENT and valid DAG cases

tasks.description: Fix merge.cjs DAG.json path from .planning/DAG.json to .planning/sets/DAG.json and migrate to use tryLoadDAG()
tasks.acceptance: merge.cjs uses tryLoadDAG(), test verifies correct path

tasks.description: Migrate all other DAG.json consumers (plan.cjs, add-set.cjs) to use tryLoadDAG()
tasks.acceptance: No direct DAG.json path construction remains outside tryLoadDAG()

tasks.description: Restructure execute-set SKILL.md Step 6 to run state transition before git commit, use explicit CWD, add retry on lock contention
tasks.acceptance: Execute-set reliably transitions to complete status

tasks.description: Add recalculateDAG() call to init SKILL.md after roadmap acceptance and STATE.json write
tasks.acceptance: DAG.json exists after fresh init flow completes

acceptance: All DAG.json operations use canonical path via tryLoadDAG()
All existing tests pass, new tests cover ENOENT and path edge cases
